subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from the glad tidings of the enkindlement of the hearts of the loved ones of God, the candle of joy was lit [3.5s]... ...The news of the attraction of the hearts of the believers of God ignited the candle of happiness and created spiritual joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از بشارت حرارت قلوب احبای الهی شمع شادمانی
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
